title: Crypto market breakout could accelerate as AI trade cools, analyst says
summary: Bitcoin topped $67,000 while crypto stocks rallied on optimism over US crypto legislation and signs investors may be rotating out of AI trades.

title: White House agrees to ethics provisions in market structure bill
summary: The price of Bitcoin moved above $66,000 to reach a seven-week high on Tuesday as reports circulated of a deal with the White House to address ethics in the CLARITY Act.

title: BlackRock vs BlackRock: Aston Martin Debt Revamp Risks In-House Clash
summary: A potential debt revamp at Aston Martin Lagonda Global Holdings Plc is setting the stage for an unusual battle between different divisions of asset management giant BlackRock Inc.

title: Stocks Climb as Rebound in Chipmakers Gathers Pace: Markets Wrap
summary: Wall Street staged a comeback as dip buyers emerged, lifting stocks amid rally in chipmakers on bets the artificial-intelligence trade that’s powered the bull market has more room to run.

title: U.S. Senator: Clarity Act is ‘Almost There,’ Treasury Secretary Puts It at the ‘1-Yard Line’
Google Is Building an AI Chip Just for Gemini—And Investors Already Moved On It
summary: Codenamed Frozen v2, Google's new server chip would bake part of Gemini's architecture directly into hardware for a projected 6–10x efficiency gain.

title: Russia passes landmark crypto bill allowing regulated retail trading
